description: Genuine cross-state write (§51.0.F.1). Inside <Loading rule=.Done>, @phase = .Done is a real transition to a distinct variant that IS in the rule= set. No self-write lint fires (this is arriving, not re-asserting), and no E-ENGINE-INVALID-TRANSITION. The legal-transition twin of engine-self-write-pos.
rationale: §51.0.F.1 a write to a DIFFERENT (in-rule) variant is a real transition, not a self-write — W-ENGINE-SELF-WRITE-DETECTED does not fire.
